Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Event Log Case by Case Case C001 Initiate Request WebPortal Verify Documents BackOfficeAgent initial check Call Customer FrontlineAgent verification incomplete Submit Additional CustomerSelfServe Verify Documents BackOfficeAgent recheck Approve Request Supervisor Observation Verify Documents happens twice first initial screening second re verification Case C002 similar initial then Call Customer twice first discrepancy second confirmation Case C003 Verify Documents twice first physical second post correction

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Identify Recurring Activities Contextual Differences Verify Documents appears twice in C001 and C003 Initial vs Post Remediation Call Customer appears twice in C002 Discrepancy Resolution vs Confirmation Initiate Request varies by channel but once per case Approve Request once per case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Strictly follow prompt Identify activities multiple times within same case rename those that recur within single case ID Prioritize Verify Documents in C001 C003 Call Customer in C002 Apply logic consistently across log for clarity

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Correction focus on activities repeat within single case Wait re read prompt prioritize within case Refinement on Call Customer consider consistency across log Self Correction on Initiate Request does not recur within case debate whether to rename for channel context

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Drafting New Names Verify Documents First Initial Document Verification Second Re Verification of Documents Call Customer C001 Request Missing Documents Call C002 first Discrepancy Clarification Call second Adjustment Confirmation Call C003 Branch Recall Call Initiate Request Online vs Branch

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review against Constraints Did identify recurring activities Yes Did rename to reflect context Yes Revised log Yes Justification Yes Check timestamps data integrity Final Polish align additional context

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Decision standardize naming across log even for single occurrences for consistency and log hygiene Simpler better names Finalize names Verify Documents Initial Re Verify Call Customer specific purposes Initiate Request channel specific Approve Final Request Approval
